tools.name: baggage.baggageTripAndContact
tools.description: Retrieve passenger trip, contact and baggage details. This service is only accessible for LH privileged partners

tools.name: offers.allFares
tools.description: Retrieves all available fares for a specific Origin & Destination pair on a given date. Available fares are: One-way and Return for 4U. Return only for OS

tools.name: offers.bestFares
tools.description: Retrieve best fares for the requested journey across multiple days or multiple months.

tools.name: offers.deepLinks
tools.description: Returns valid deep links for the provided input parameters

tools.name: offers.fares
tools.description: Retrieve all available fares per fare family for a specific Origin & Destination on a given date

tools.name: offers.faresSubscriptions
tools.description: Create a subscription for best price O&D. Receive regular updates on lowest fares

tools.name: offers.lhDeepLinksFfp
tools.description: Returns valid LH deep links (FFP - links to flight selection screen on LH.COM)

tools.name: offers.lhDeepLinksItco
tools.description: Returns valid LH deep links (ITCO - links to shopping cart on LH.COM)

tools.name: offers.lowestFares
tools.description: Retrieve lowest fare for a specific Origin & Destination pair on a given date. Available fares are: One-way and Return for 4U. Return only for OS & LH

tools.name: offers.ondRoute
tools.description: Returns LH route origin & destination information

tools.name: offers.ondStatus
tools.description: Returns LH network route status information. Search for recently added or retired routes

tools.name: offers.topOnd
tools.description: Returns LH Top routes per country or across all countries

tools.name: orders.getOperation
tools.description: Retrieve order by ID and optionally name. This service is only accessible for LH privileged partners

tools.name: preflight.autoCheckIn
tools.description: Trigger an automatic check-in given a ticket number. This service is only accessible for LH privileged partners

tools.name: promotions.priceOffers
tools.description: Retrieve a best price offer given an origin and destination.

tools.name: referenceData.seatDetails
tools.description: A description of all available seat details by aircraft type. You can retrieve the full set or details for a particular aircraft type.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
